$comment: Azure secret-redaction rules for the importer/kit-azure kit's normalize.py `check`.
DELIBERATELY SEPARATE from catalog/redaction-rules.json: that file is vendored
ccp/app/src/data/) per AGENTS.md Rule 6 and is AWS/control-plane-scoped. Adding
Azure secret attribute names there would force all three copies to change in lockstep;
keeping Azure rules here sidesteps that invariant entirely. This file is consumed ONLY
by importer/kit-azure/normalize.py `check` (its --rules default), never by the SPA or
catalogctl. Same schema as catalog/redaction-rules.json so the check code is a faithful
port. secretAttributeNames matching is fail-closed (an empty list REFUSES).
KNOWN LIMIT (documented, not a silent gap): the check is line-oriented and matches an
attribute NAME against secretAttributeNames. It does NOT yet honor maskAllValuesInBlocks
(secrets under arbitrary keys inside app_settings / Key Vault body blocks) — that needs
block-aware scanning and is a named follow-up before importing Function Apps / Key Vaults
